art_bible_dependency.notes: Requested Art Bible files were not present at the expected repository path during this pass. Validate this manifest against the Art Bible once those files are restored.

entries.collision_notes: Use logical walls and prop blockers, not pixel collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Base layer only, props and doors remain separate.
entries.visual_notes: Dark wall masses, blue grey floor, readable entry, living room, kitchen, bathroom, and stairs.
entries.implementation_notes: Map existing Floor 1 rooms to this layout before replacing visible art.

entries.collision_notes: Use logical walls and prop blockers, not pixel collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Base layer only, props and doors remain separate.
entries.visual_notes: Private upper floor with hall, bedroom, office, upstairs bathroom, and stairs.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep current Floor 2 toggle and stairs transfer compatible.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Pair with living light, TV, and stereo states.
entries.visual_notes: Cyan entertainment wall strip with magenta leisure accent and dark floor.
entries.implementation_notes: Render as overlay or room lighting state.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Triggered by TV on with room light off or dim.
entries.visual_notes: Blue cyan TV glow spills onto couch and floor while walls remain dark.
entries.implementation_notes: Do not change TV hit zone or couch collision.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Pair with fridge, stove, and sink actions.
entries.visual_notes: Cyan under cabinet strips with low magenta appliance LEDs.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep appliance sprites separate from lighting.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Supports shower and toilet readability.
entries.visual_notes: Blue white overhead bathroom light with cyan mirror rim.
entries.implementation_notes: Preserve privacy and hygiene object visibility.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Pairs with front door interaction.
entries.visual_notes: Cyan door seal and soft magenta exterior spill.
entries.implementation_notes: Do not merge door art with exit trigger.

entries.collision_notes: Rail sides block, landing is transfer interaction zone.
entries.interaction_notes: Only landing side should trigger floor transfer.
entries.visual_notes: Dark stair treads with cyan edge strips and black rails.
entries.implementation_notes: Map to existing stairs transfer logic.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Pairs with bed and bedroom light.
entries.visual_notes: Soft cyan wall strip and blue grey private room base.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep bed silhouette and interaction side readable.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Privacy state should not alter bed hit zone.
entries.visual_notes: Low magenta privacy strip with window city glow and dark bed mass.
entries.implementation_notes: Use overlay, do not hide player or bed.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Pairs with laptop desk and bookshelf.
entries.visual_notes: Cyan laptop glow with magenta equipment LEDs and dark tech floor.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep desk and shelf sprites separate.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Triggered by laptop desk action.
entries.visual_notes: Focused cyan screen glow across desk and chair.
entries.implementation_notes: Do not alter desk collision or chair pathing.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Supports upstairs shower, toilet, and sink readability.
entries.visual_notes: Compact blue white bathroom light with cyan mirror trim.
entries.implementation_notes: Use same bathroom language as Floor 1.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: No default interaction, supports room access readability.
entries.visual_notes: Low cyan baseboard guide strip in dark upper hall.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep hall clear and compatible with room doorways.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Triggered by stereo or future dance action.
entries.visual_notes: Magenta stereo pulse with subtle cyan counter pulse.
entries.implementation_notes: Future state, do not wire until music state supports it.

entries.collision_notes: Lighting overlay has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Future event state only.
entries.visual_notes: Hot magenta, red, or amber warning light while exits stay readable.
entries.implementation_notes: Do not wire until bad event logic exists.

entries.collision_notes: Future logical walls, storage blockers, couch, and podcast desk blockers.
entries.interaction_notes: Future hatch or stair access, podcast desk and couch actions.
entries.visual_notes: Dark concrete basement with cyan edge strips, magenta audio LEDs, and monitor glow.
entries.implementation_notes: Placeholder plan only until basement navigation and camera exist.

entries.collision_notes: Future garage walls, car blocker, tool rack and workbench blockers.
entries.interaction_notes: Future car, tool rack, garage door, and travel launch actions.
entries.visual_notes: Industrial dark garage with cyan lane guides and magenta car bay accents.
entries.implementation_notes: Placeholder plan only until garage navigation and travel actions exist.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker with clear front approach.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front edge facing TV.
entries.visual_notes: Dark low couch with worn blue grey fabric and magenta seam.
entries.implementation_notes: Map to existing couch object where present.

entries.collision_notes: TV console blocks if floor standing, wall screen uses wall collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front center.
entries.visual_notes: Thin dark screen with cyan glow and black console.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep TV hit zone separate from glow overlay.

entries.collision_notes: Small blocker if floor standing, non blocking if wall mounted.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front or side panel.
entries.visual_notes: Dark speaker or smart stereo with magenta LEDs.
entries.implementation_notes: Can drive future music pulse overlay.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker aligned to wall or counter run.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from door side.
entries.visual_notes: Tall smart fridge with cyan handle and status panel.
entries.implementation_notes: Map to existing fridge object where present.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker as part of counter line.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from open kitchen side.
entries.visual_notes: Dark induction stove with controlled heat glow.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep stove glow as separate state overlay if possible.

entries.collision_notes: Solid counter blocker, basin visual only.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from open kitchen side.
entries.visual_notes: Recessed sink with small cyan faucet light.
entries.implementation_notes: Map only if sink gameplay exists, otherwise visual future ready.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker with one clear entry side.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from shower door edge.
entries.visual_notes: Compact glass shower cell with cyan safety rim.
entries.implementation_notes: Support future steam and water state.

entries.collision_notes: Small solid blocker.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front tile.
entries.visual_notes: Compact dark toilet with pale blue top highlight.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep click zone distinct from shower.

entries.collision_notes: Door frame blocks movement, threshold handles exit action.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from interior threshold.
entries.visual_notes: Heavy reinforced door with cyan seal and access pad.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep current exit behavior unless migrated.

entries.collision_notes: Prefer non blocking, small click target.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from open floor side.
entries.visual_notes: Low metal bowl with cyan rim.
entries.implementation_notes: Support food empty and filled variants later.

entries.collision_notes: Non blocking if ceiling, switch panel non blocking.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from wall switch or light object area.
entries.visual_notes: Ceiling panel or wall sconce with cyan white light.
entries.implementation_notes: Connect to living room light state only if existing logic supports it.

entries.collision_notes: Non blocking if ceiling, switch panel non blocking.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from switch or light object area.
entries.visual_notes: Soft bedroom panel light with dim strip variant.
entries.implementation_notes: Support privacy dim state.

entries.collision_notes: Rail sides block, landing stays open.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from landing edge only.
entries.visual_notes: Dark stair bands with cyan tread strips.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep existing floor transfer ID compatible.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker with one or two approach edges.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from open side or foot.
entries.visual_notes: Dark bed with blue grey blanket and cyan underframe.
entries.implementation_notes: Map to existing bed object where present.

entries.collision_notes: Desk and chair block if mapped, keep approach clear.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from chair side or desk front.
entries.visual_notes: Dark laptop desk with cyan screen glow and cable tray.
entries.implementation_notes: Future typing or work state can attach here.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker against wall.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from open room side.
entries.visual_notes: Dark shelf with books and storage blocks.
entries.implementation_notes: Can remain visual until gameplay is added.

entries.collision_notes: Non walkable, part of exterior wall collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Optional future click from room side.
entries.visual_notes: Thick wall window with cyan city glow and magenta reflection.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep as wall cut, not doorway.

entries.collision_notes: Non walkable, part of exterior wall collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Optional future click from room side.
entries.visual_notes: Privacy glass bedroom window with cyan city glow.
entries.implementation_notes: Support smart blind state later.

entries.collision_notes: Non blocking or tiny blocker if on shelf or desk.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front face.
entries.visual_notes: Small dock with cyan charge ring and magenta notification dot.
entries.implementation_notes: Future notification control hub.

entries.collision_notes: Table and chairs block if mapped, keep path clear.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from chair side or table edge.
entries.visual_notes: Compact dark table with cyan edge strip.
entries.implementation_notes: Future meal and social action prop.

entries.collision_notes: Large solid blocker with clear driver side approach.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from driver side or bay marker.
entries.visual_notes: Dark cyberpunk car top view with cyan lane glow.
entries.implementation_notes: Future travel launch object.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker, chair side clear.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from chair or mixer side.
entries.visual_notes: Podcast desk with mic arms, mixer, monitors, and cables.
entries.implementation_notes: Future recording and content action object.

entries.collision_notes: Solid blocker with front approach.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front edge.
entries.visual_notes: Heavy dark basement couch with neon sign spill.
entries.implementation_notes: Future basement lounge prop.

entries.collision_notes: Wall mounted non blocker unless paired with bench.
entries.interaction_notes: Interact from front face.
entries.visual_notes: Tool grid with cyan labels and dark silhouettes.
entries.implementation_notes: Future repair and upgrade support.
